## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No real personal or financial data is included (PAN, account numbers, actual filing figures)

### If `rules/` changed

- [ ] Updated the paired `rules/*.md` file and bumped **Last verified**
- [ ] Ran `cd webapp && npm run sync-rules`
- [ ] Added a dated entry to [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md)
- [ ] Searched the repo for the old rate/threshold/due date

### If `webapp/` changed

- [ ] Ran `cd webapp && npm run validate:all` locally
